t: Creating API keys to authorize API requests
a: Create API keys you use to sign JSON Web Tokens and authorize API requests.
Refer to these data types for decoded transaction and renewal information payloads.

t: Data types for Advanced Commerce API
a: Objects and data types for transactions that use the Advanced Commerce API.
Understand the error codes that App Store Server API responses return.

t: Extend Subscription Renewal Dates for All Active Subscribers
a: Uses a subscription’s product identifier to extend the renewal date for all of its eligible active subscribers.
Extends the renewal date of a customer’s active subscription using the original transaction identifier.
The request body that contains subscription-renewal-extension data for an individual subscription.
A response that indicates whether an individual renewal-date extension succeeded, and related details.

t: Extending the renewal date for auto-renewable subscriptions
a: Compensate eligible active subscribers for service interruptions by extending a subscription’s renewal date.
An error that indicates a subscription isn’t directly eligible for a renewal date extension because the customer obtained it through Family Sharing.
An error that indicates the transaction is for a product the customer obtains through Family Sharing, which the endpoint doesn’t support.
Notifies the App Store server that your system has finished processing the customer’s transaction.
An error that indicates an invalid request.
An error that indicates a general internal error.
An error response that indicates an unknown error occurred, but you can try again.

t: Generating JSON Web Tokens for API requests
a: Create JSON Web Tokens signed with your private key to authorize requests for App Store Server API and External Purchase Server API.
Get the statuses for all of a customer’s auto-renewable subscriptions in your app.
Get a customer’s app transaction information for your app.
Get a list of notifications that the App Store server attempted to send to your server.

Get a list of up to 50 of a customer’s refunded in-app purchases for your app.

t: Get Status of Subscription Renewal Date Extensions
a: Checks whether a renewal date extension request completed, and provides the final count of successful or failed extensions.

t: Simplifying your implementation by using the App Store Server Library
